hero.title: Good Morning
hero.subtitle: Optimizing the hydration experience to reduce user drop-off.

cta.title: View the interactive prototype on Figma

architecture.title: Information architecture
architecture.description: Structuring navigation levels and content to clarify the hydration journey. User journey definition and screen tree.

wireframes.title: Structure & ergonomics
wireframes.description: Low-fi wireframes to establish visual hierarchy, action areas, and reading rhythm. Early validation of flows and readability before graphic exploration.

da.title: Art direction
da.description: Exploring bold, minimalist, high-contrast directions to frame the art direction. Graphic tests and identity directions aligned with the product vision.

designSystem.title: Design system & guidelines
designSystem.description: Formalizing typography, color, and component rules for a consistent deliverable. Graphic charter and UI foundation to scale final screens.
